device_resource_cards.compute_profile: local GPU worker; synthetic fixture only
device_resource_cards.revocation_path: revoke device card and delete active job leases
delete provider lease and reject future bids

portal_card.safe_output_profile: status and residuals only; no private data displayed in public

Does not promote chapter support state.

job_contract.objective: Run a local private draft render check with no rented-node exposure.
job_contract.authority_ceiling: read private draft and run local validators only
job_contract.budget_limit: no external spend; local foreground run only
job_contract.energy_policy: battery protected; desktop allowed within quiet-hour budget
job_contract.verification_predicate: render/check command exits cleanly and records residuals
job_contract.residual_policy: if selected device drops out, requeue locally and preserve audit residual
non_claims: Does not execute a deployed personal compute hive.
Does not promote chapter support state.

job_bids.policy_reason: eligible after identity, data, tool, energy, dropout, and approval policy filtering
non_claims: Does not prove runtime scheduler quality.
Does not promote chapter support state.

job_bids.policy_reason: faster rented node is policy blocked because local_only personal_private data cannot leave the owner hive
non_claims: Does not prove deployed runtime hive or rented-node sandbox behavior.
Does not promote chapter support state.

rejected_nodes.reason: faster but policy blocked by local_only personal_private data boundary

scheduling_decision.selected_reason: selected after policy-first filtering, approval receipt, energy budget, and dropout residual review
scheduling_decision.secret_handle_plan: handles_only; no raw credential material enters the model context
residuals: dropout recovery is represented as requeue residual, not executed
non_claims: Does not prove deployed hive scheduler or network behavior.
Does not promote chapter support state.

approval_receipts.approval_scope: Approve local-only private render check on home desktop for this job only.
approval_receipts.reversal_path: stop job and delete local approval receipt
non_claims: Does not prove a deployed approval-service runtime.
Does not promote chapter support state.
